---
title: "Presentations"
format: html
---

```{r, include=FALSE}
library(yaml)
library(dplyr)
library(lubridate)
library(purrr)

talks <- yaml::read_yaml("data/talks.yml") |>
  bind_rows()

# ---- Force required columns to exist ----
required_cols <- c("slides", "link", "city", "state")

for (col in required_cols) {
  if (!col %in% names(talks)) {
    talks[[col]] <- NA_character_
  }
}

talks <- talks |>
  mutate(
    date = as.Date(date),
    year = year(date)
  ) |>
  arrange(desc(date))
```

```{r, include=FALSE}
render_section <- function(data, section_title) {
  
  cat("## ", section_title, "\n\n", sep = "")
  
  if (nrow(data) == 0) {
    cat("_No entries._\n\n")
    return(invisible(NULL))
  }
  
  data <- data |> arrange(desc(date))
  
  for (yr in unique(data$year)) {
    
    cat("### ", yr, "\n\n", sep = "")
    
    subset <- data |> filter(year == yr)
    
    for (i in seq_len(nrow(subset))) {
      
      row <- subset[i, ]
      
      # Location
      location <- if (!is.na(row$city)) {
        paste0(row$city, ", ", row$state)
      } else {
        "Virtual"
      }
      
      # Slides
      slide_text <- if (!is.na(row$slides)) {
        paste0(" | [Slides](", row$slides, ")")
      } else ""
      
      # Recording
      link_text <- if (!is.na(row$link)) {
        paste0(" | [Recording](", row$link, ")")
      } else ""
      
      cat(
        "- **", row$venue, "** — \"", row$title, "\"  \n",
        location,
        slide_text,
        link_text,
        "\n\n",
        sep = ""
      )
    }
  }
}
```

```{r, results='asis', echo=FALSE}
render_section(
  talks |> filter(category == "invited"),
  "National & International Invited Presentations"
)
```

```{r, results='asis', echo=FALSE}
render_section(
  talks |> filter(category == "conference"),
  "Conference Presentations"
)
```

```{r, results='asis', echo=FALSE}
render_section(
  talks |> filter(category == "grand_rounds"),
  "Grand Rounds"
)
```

```{r, results='asis', echo=FALSE}
render_section(
  talks |> filter(category == "teaching"),
  "Teaching & Case Conferences"
)
```
